creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #19)
I'd rather see that we're being proactive about maintenance, we already have a lot of ports failing to build, being abandoned upstream etc. Most if not all committers are volunteers with all that entails including time and interest so any proactive maintenance is more than welcome.

See https://portsfallout.com/fallout?env=140amd64-default for example

Again, it's not like your Musepack media will go lost and Poudriere supports overlays.
